metadata.description: Role-based dispatcher agents for PM, engineering, QA, DevOps, design, and security workflows with generalized routing to specialist skills

plugins.name: pm-agent
plugins.description: Dispatcher for product discovery, scope shaping, specs, empty/new-repo app ideas before coding, competitive research, release communication, roadmaps, and GitHub project status.

plugins.name: engineer-agent
plugins.description: Dispatcher for repo analysis, spec-driven project bootstrap, implementation, debugging, testing, and delivery once requirements are settled or the user explicitly wants scaffolding.

plugins.name: qa-agent
plugins.description: Dispatcher for acceptance testing, exploratory testing, bug analysis, and regression verification.

plugins.name: devops-agent
plugins.description: Dispatcher for deployment planning, CI/CD automation, environment audits, and rollback/runbook preparation.

plugins.name: designer-agent
plugins.description: Dispatcher for UX flows, UI structure, wireframes, reference-pattern analysis, and visual design systems.

plugins.name: security-agent
plugins.description: Dispatcher for application security, auth/authz review, dependency risk, and privacy/data-flow reviews.
